title: The Seige
description: The Seige is a gun modpack which aims to have great fun with many guns.
body:
![](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d63963a41ab794a2928a7e57ce6a79afd5f59843_0.webp)


# The Seige.

### Introducing a brand new gun modpack.

**The Seige is an immersive gun modpack with features spanning from planes to gear to backpacks to even FURNITURE?** (There's many more!)

The Seige is made by [strapig](https://youtube.com/@strapig), Only works with Forge Mod Loader (FML)

**Licensed with [Apache License 2.0](https://www.apache.org/licenses/LICENSE-2.0.html)**

**Only on [Modrinth](https://modrinth.com/)**
